SELECT s6.asset_id, s1.sensor_id, s6.is_active FROM sensor_readings AS s1 INNER JOIN sensors AS s6 ON s1.sensor_id = s6.id WHERE s6.id <= 221

SELECT * FROM incidents AS i1 INNER JOIN assets AS a2 ON i1.asset_id = a2.id

SELECT * FROM assets AS a1 INNER JOIN sensors AS s2 ON a1.id = s2.asset_id

SELECT * FROM incidents AS i1 INNER JOIN assets AS a5 ON i1.asset_id = a5.id

SELECT * FROM work_orders AS w1 INNER JOIN technicians AS t8 ON w1.technician_id = t8.id

SELECT m1.description, a8.location_longitude, m1.status, a8.installation_date FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 LEFT JOIN assets AS a8 ON m1.asset_id = a8.id WHERE a8.installation_date > DATETIME('now', '-9 days')
SELECT t1.is_available, w9.assigned_at, w9.completed_at, w9.request_id FROM technicians AS t1 LEFT JOIN work_orders AS w9 ON t1.id = w9.technician_id WHERE w9.id >= 662
SELECT * FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 INNER JOIN work_orders AS w6 ON m1.id = w6.request_id WHERE w6.completion_notes LIKE '%c'
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM assets AS inner_assets WHERE inner_assets.status <> 'admin') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.asset_type LIKE 'b%'
SELECT i1.severity, i1.incident_type FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE i1.asset_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.location_longitude > 568)
SELECT a1.id, a1.asset_name, a1.asset_type FROM assets AS a1 JOIN assets AS a2 ON a1.asset_name = a2.asset_name AND a1.id <> a2.id LIMIT 12
SELECT i1.asset_id, i1.detected_at FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.id = i1.asset_id AND sub_a.location_longitude = 185)
SELECT s1.sensor_id, s1.quality_flag, s1.reading_value FROM sensor_readings AS s1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM sensors AS sub_s WHERE sub_s.id = s1.sensor_id AND sub_s.sensor_type = '123')
SELECT i1.id, i1.asset_id, i1.detected_at FROM incidents AS i1 JOIN incidents AS i2 ON i1.asset_id = i2.asset_id AND i1.id <> i2.id
SELECT t1.is_available, t1.last_name, t1.id, t1.certification_level FROM technicians AS t1 WHERE t1.id IN (SELECT sub_w.technician_id FROM work_orders AS sub_w WHERE sub_w.request_id <= 108)

SELECT s1.id, s1.recorded_at, s1.reading_value, s1.quality_flag FROM sensor_readings AS s1 WHERE s1.sensor_id IN (SELECT sub_s.id FROM sensors AS sub_s WHERE sub_s.installed_on >= DATETIME('now', '-16 days'))
SELECT s1.is_active FROM sensors AS s1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM sensor_readings AS sub_s WHERE sub_s.sensor_id = s1.id AND sub_s.reading_value = 334)
SELECT * FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.id = m1.asset_id AND sub_a.id <= 883)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM sensor_readings AS inner_sensor_readings WHERE inner_sensor_readings.id = 340) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.quality_flag = 'user'
SELECT t1.hire_date, t1.id, t1.phone_number, t1.last_name FROM technicians AS t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM work_orders AS sub_w WHERE sub_w.technician_id = t1.id AND sub_w.id = 701)
SELECT i1.is_resolved, i1.asset_id, i1.id FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE i1.asset_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.location_latitude <> 132)
SELECT m1.issue_type FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.id IN (SELECT sub_w.request_id FROM work_orders AS sub_w WHERE sub_w.labor_hours <= 747)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM sensors AS inner_sensors WHERE inner_sensors.sensor_type = 'admin') AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM departments AS inner_departments WHERE inner_departments.name <> 'test') AS derived_table
SELECT t1.last_name, t1.is_available, t1.phone_number FROM technicians AS t1 WHERE t1.id IN (SELECT sub_w.technician_id FROM work_orders AS sub_w WHERE sub_w.technician_id < 708)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM sensors AS inner_sensors WHERE inner_sensors.installed_on >= DATETIME('now', '-19 days')) AS derived_table
SELECT d1.contact_email, d1.is_active FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.id IN (SELECT sub_a.department_id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.location_longitude > 154)
SELECT a1.asset_type, a1.asset_name FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.department_id IN (SELECT sub_d.id FROM departments AS sub_d WHERE sub_d.operating_budget < 943)
SELECT s1.id, s1.asset_id, s1.sensor_type FROM sensors AS s1 JOIN sensors AS s2 ON s1.asset_id = s2.asset_id AND s1.id <> s2.id LIMIT 16
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM incidents AS inner_incidents WHERE inner_incidents.asset_id < 348) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM work_orders AS sub_w WHERE sub_w.request_id = m1.id AND sub_w.request_id >= 893)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM technicians AS inner_technicians WHERE inner_technicians.first_name <> '123') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.last_name <> '123'
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM technicians AS inner_technicians WHERE inner_technicians.phone_number = 'admin') AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM assets AS a1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM maintenance_requests AS sub_m WHERE sub_m.asset_id = a1.id AND sub_m.asset_id >= 576)
SELECT d1.name, d1.id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.id IN (SELECT sub_a.department_id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.id < 348)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM work_orders AS inner_work_orders WHERE inner_work_orders.id >= 580) AS derived_table
SELECT a1.id, a1.asset_name, a1.asset_type FROM assets AS a1 JOIN assets AS a2 ON a1.asset_name = a2.asset_name AND a1.id <> a2.id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM assets AS inner_assets WHERE inner_assets.location_longitude > 94) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.asset_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.location_latitude <> 94)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM sensor_readings AS inner_sensor_readings WHERE inner_sensor_readings.quality_flag = '123') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.quality_flag LIKE 'b%'
SELECT a1.department_id, a1.asset_name, a1.id, a1.location_latitude FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.id IN (SELECT sub_i.asset_id FROM incidents AS sub_i WHERE sub_i.severity = 'admin')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM technicians AS inner_technicians WHERE inner_technicians.is_available = 0) AS derived_table
SELECT d1.id, d1.operating_budget, d1.is_active FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.id IN (SELECT sub_a.department_id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.status = 'user')

SELECT m1.resolved_at, m1.issue_type, m1.reported_at FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.asset_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.installation_date < DATETIME('now', '-30 days'))
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM incidents AS inner_incidents WHERE inner_incidents.id >= 315) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM technicians AS t1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM work_orders AS sub_w WHERE sub_w.technician_id = t1.id AND sub_w.completion_notes <> 'user')
SELECT m1.description, m1.asset_id, m1.priority_level, m1.issue_type FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.asset_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.id < 435)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM maintenance_requests AS inner_maintenance_requests WHERE inner_maintenance_requests.priority_level = 'test') AS derived_table
SELECT s1.recorded_at, s1.quality_flag, s1.id FROM sensor_readings AS s1 WHERE s1.sensor_id IN (SELECT sub_s.id FROM sensors AS sub_s WHERE sub_s.is_active = 0)
SELECT d1.name, d1.operating_budget, d1.contact_email FROM departments AS d1 JOIN departments AS d2 ON d1.id = d2.id AND d1.id <> d2.id LIMIT 11
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM sensor_readings AS inner_sensor_readings WHERE inner_sensor_readings.id <> 699) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM work_orders AS inner_work_orders WHERE inner_work_orders.request_id = 749) AS derived_table
SELECT s1.asset_id, s1.installed_on, s1.unit, s1.id FROM sensors AS s1 WHERE s1.id IN (SELECT sub_s.sensor_id FROM sensor_readings AS sub_s WHERE sub_s.quality_flag = 'user')
SELECT w1.id, w1.request_id, w1.technician_id FROM work_orders AS w1 JOIN work_orders AS w2 ON w1.request_id = w2.request_id AND w1.id <> w2.id
SELECT d1.name, d1.operating_budget, d1.contact_email FROM departments AS d1 JOIN departments AS d2 ON d1.id = d2.id AND d1.id <> d2.id

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM assets AS inner_assets WHERE inner_assets.installation_date < DATETIME('now', '-20 days')) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.installation_date >= DATETIME('now', '-12 days')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM incidents AS inner_incidents WHERE inner_incidents.incident_type <> 'activity') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.severity = 'activity'
SELECT * FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE i1.asset_id IN (SELECT sub_a.id FROM assets AS sub_a WHERE sub_a.asset_type <> 'user')

SELECT t1.last_name, t1.certification_level, t1.id FROM technicians AS t1 WHERE t1.certification_level <> 'user' UNION SELECT t2.last_name, t2.certification_level, t2.id FROM technicians AS t2 WHERE t2.is_available = 0

SELECT d1.operating_budget, d1.contact_email, d1.id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.is_active = 0 UNION ALL SELECT d2.operating_budget, d2.contact_email, d2.id FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.contact_email = 'user74@example.com'

SELECT a1.installation_date, a1.department_id, a1.asset_type, a1.status FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.department_id < 204 UNION SELECT a2.installation_date, a2.department_id, a2.asset_type, a2.status FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.location_longitude <= 686

SELECT w1.labor_hours, w1.id, w1.completion_notes, w1.technician_id FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.request_id = 527 UNION ALL SELECT w2.labor_hours, w2.id, w2.completion_notes, w2.technician_id FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.technician_id <= 506 ORDER BY labor_hours LIMIT 26

SELECT a1.installation_date, a1.location_longitude, a1.asset_name, a1.id FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.location_latitude < 316 UNION SELECT a2.installation_date, a2.location_longitude, a2.asset_name, a2.id FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.id = 494

SELECT i1.asset_id, i1.detected_at, i1.incident_type FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE i1.is_resolved = 0 UNION SELECT i2.asset_id, i2.detected_at, i2.incident_type FROM incidents AS i2 WHERE i2.severity LIKE '%c'

SELECT m1.description, m1.status, m1.id, m1.asset_id FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.resolved_at <= DATETIME('now', '-7 days') UNION SELECT m2.description, m2.status, m2.id, m2.asset_id FROM maintenance_requests AS m2 WHERE m2.issue_type LIKE '%c'

SELECT s1.quality_flag, s1.sensor_id FROM sensor_readings AS s1 WHERE s1.id <> 335 UNION ALL SELECT s2.quality_flag, s2.sensor_id FROM sensor_readings AS s2 WHERE s2.reading_value < 951 ORDER BY quality_flag

SELECT m1.reported_at, m1.description, m1.priority_level FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.status <> 'admin' UNION SELECT m2.reported_at, m2.description, m2.priority_level FROM maintenance_requests AS m2 WHERE m2.issue_type = 'user'
SELECT s1.installed_on, s1.unit FROM sensors AS s1 WHERE s1.id < 285 UNION ALL SELECT s2.installed_on, s2.unit FROM sensors AS s2 WHERE s2.unit <> '123' ORDER BY installed_on LIMIT 16
SELECT s1.installed_on, s1.is_active, s1.sensor_type FROM sensors AS s1 WHERE s1.asset_id > 493 UNION ALL SELECT s2.installed_on, s2.is_active, s2.sensor_type FROM sensors AS s2 WHERE s2.id >= 74

SELECT s1.recorded_at, s1.reading_value, s1.quality_flag FROM sensor_readings AS s1 WHERE s1.sensor_id = 165 UNION SELECT s2.recorded_at, s2.reading_value, s2.quality_flag FROM sensor_readings AS s2 WHERE s2.reading_value <> 388

SELECT w1.assigned_at, w1.request_id, w1.technician_id, w1.completed_at FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.labor_hours < 789 UNION SELECT w2.assigned_at, w2.request_id, w2.technician_id, w2.completed_at FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.id = 427

SELECT w1.request_id, w1.completed_at FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.technician_id <> 113 UNION ALL SELECT w2.request_id, w2.completed_at FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.completed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-14 days')
SELECT a1.status, a1.department_id FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.location_longitude >= 652 UNION ALL SELECT a2.status, a2.department_id FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.status <> 'activity' LIMIT 36
SELECT s1.is_active, s1.unit FROM sensors AS s1 WHERE s1.id <> 750 UNION SELECT s2.is_active, s2.unit FROM sensors AS s2 WHERE s2.asset_id > 764

SELECT s1.installed_on, s1.asset_id, s1.is_active FROM sensors AS s1 WHERE s1.installed_on >= DATETIME('now', '-29 days') UNION SELECT s2.installed_on, s2.asset_id, s2.is_active FROM sensors AS s2 WHERE s2.sensor_type <> 'activity'

SELECT s1.id, s1.reading_value, s1.quality_flag, s1.sensor_id FROM sensor_readings AS s1 WHERE s1.sensor_id <= 124 UNION ALL SELECT s2.id, s2.reading_value, s2.quality_flag, s2.sensor_id FROM sensor_readings AS s2 WHERE s2.id < 993

SELECT w1.completed_at, w1.assigned_at FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.completed_at > DATETIME('now', '-26 days') UNION ALL SELECT w2.completed_at, w2.assigned_at FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.labor_hours <= 891 LIMIT 44

SELECT s1.quality_flag, s1.recorded_at, s1.id, s1.reading_value FROM sensor_readings AS s1 WHERE s1.reading_value <> 447 UNION SELECT s2.quality_flag, s2.recorded_at, s2.id, s2.reading_value FROM sensor_readings AS s2 WHERE s2.sensor_id <> 299

SELECT m1.description, m1.id, m1.priority_level FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.status LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT m2.description, m2.id, m2.priority_level FROM maintenance_requests AS m2 WHERE m2.asset_id <= 530 LIMIT 12

SELECT a1.id, a1.installation_date, a1.asset_type FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.department_id > 546 UNION SELECT a2.id, a2.installation_date, a2.asset_type FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.asset_name LIKE '%c' LIMIT 28

SELECT i1.id, i1.severity, i1.incident_type, i1.detected_at FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE i1.asset_id = 208 UNION SELECT i2.id, i2.severity, i2.incident_type, i2.detected_at FROM incidents AS i2 WHERE i2.severity <> 'admin' ORDER BY id

SELECT s1.installed_on, s1.sensor_type FROM sensors AS s1 WHERE s1.unit <> 'test' UNION SELECT s2.installed_on, s2.sensor_type FROM sensors AS s2 WHERE s2.installed_on <= DATETIME('now', '-12 days') ORDER BY installed_on LIMIT 21

SELECT w1.request_id, w1.started_at, w1.technician_id, w1.completion_notes FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.id >= 584 UNION SELECT w2.request_id, w2.started_at, w2.technician_id, w2.completion_notes FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.labor_hours = 794 LIMIT 33

SELECT d1.name, d1.is_active, d1.contact_email FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.operating_budget <> 839 UNION SELECT d2.name, d2.is_active, d2.contact_email FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.operating_budget <= 513 ORDER BY name

SELECT a1.installation_date, a1.department_id, a1.location_longitude, a1.asset_name FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.id >= 849 UNION ALL SELECT a2.installation_date, a2.department_id, a2.location_longitude, a2.asset_name FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.asset_type = 'activity' LIMIT 42

SELECT a1.department_id, a1.installation_date, a1.location_latitude FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.id >= 530 UNION ALL SELECT a2.department_id, a2.installation_date, a2.location_latitude FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.status = 'activity'

SELECT t1.is_available, t1.hire_date FROM technicians AS t1 WHERE t1.phone_number = '123' UNION ALL SELECT t2.is_available, t2.hire_date FROM technicians AS t2 WHERE t2.first_name LIKE '%c' ORDER BY is_available

SELECT m1.issue_type, m1.priority_level, m1.id, m1.asset_id FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.reported_at > DATETIME('now', '-3 days') UNION SELECT m2.issue_type, m2.priority_level, m2.id, m2.asset_id FROM maintenance_requests AS m2 WHERE m2.status <> 'admin'

SELECT w1.labor_hours, w1.technician_id, w1.completion_notes, w1.request_id FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.labor_hours >= 295 UNION SELECT w2.labor_hours, w2.technician_id, w2.completion_notes, w2.request_id FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.completion_notes = 'admin'

SELECT m1.reported_at, m1.issue_type FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.reported_at >= DATETIME('now', '-22 days') UNION SELECT m2.reported_at, m2.issue_type FROM maintenance_requests AS m2 WHERE m2.reported_at < DATETIME('now', '-19 days') ORDER BY reported_at

SELECT a1.asset_name, a1.location_latitude, a1.id FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.location_latitude >= 603 UNION ALL SELECT a2.asset_name, a2.location_latitude, a2.id FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.status <> 'user' LIMIT 22

SELECT w1.completed_at, w1.started_at, w1.request_id FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.completed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-17 days') UNION SELECT w2.completed_at, w2.started_at, w2.request_id FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.started_at <= DATETIME('now', '-14 days')

SELECT m1.asset_id, m1.priority_level, m1.status FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.resolved_at >= DATETIME('now', '-12 days') UNION SELECT m2.asset_id, m2.priority_level, m2.status FROM maintenance_requests AS m2 WHERE m2.issue_type = 'admin'

SELECT w1.started_at, w1.request_id, w1.completed_at, w1.assigned_at FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.technician_id = 415 UNION SELECT w2.started_at, w2.request_id, w2.completed_at, w2.assigned_at FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.labor_hours < 530

SELECT w1.started_at, w1.assigned_at, w1.technician_id, w1.labor_hours FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.technician_id < 908 UNION SELECT w2.started_at, w2.assigned_at, w2.technician_id, w2.labor_hours FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.id > 239 ORDER BY started_at
SELECT d1.id, d1.name, d1.contact_email FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.is_active = 1 UNION SELECT d2.id, d2.name, d2.contact_email FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.is_active = 1

SELECT i1.id, i1.detected_at, i1.asset_id, i1.incident_type FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE i1.id > 337 UNION SELECT i2.id, i2.detected_at, i2.asset_id, i2.incident_type FROM incidents AS i2 WHERE i2.asset_id = 510 LIMIT 25

SELECT d1.id, d1.contact_email FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.contact_email = 'user19@example.com' UNION ALL SELECT d2.id, d2.contact_email FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.contact_email = 'user17@example.com' ORDER BY id

SELECT i1.asset_id, i1.severity, i1.is_resolved FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE i1.detected_at <= DATETIME('now', '-18 days') UNION SELECT i2.asset_id, i2.severity, i2.is_resolved FROM incidents AS i2 WHERE i2.incident_type LIKE '%a%' ORDER BY asset_id

SELECT w1.id, w1.completion_notes, w1.technician_id, w1.started_at FROM work_orders AS w1 WHERE w1.started_at <= DATETIME('now', '-19 days') UNION SELECT w2.id, w2.completion_notes, w2.technician_id, w2.started_at FROM work_orders AS w2 WHERE w2.completed_at < DATETIME('now', '-29 days')

SELECT m1.status, m1.reported_at, m1.priority_level FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.id <= 482 UNION ALL SELECT m2.status, m2.reported_at, m2.priority_level FROM maintenance_requests AS m2 WHERE m2.reported_at >= DATETIME('now', '-13 days') ORDER BY status LIMIT 19

SELECT m1.id, m1.resolved_at FROM maintenance_requests AS m1 WHERE m1.resolved_at >= DATETIME('now', '-13 days') UNION SELECT m2.id, m2.resolved_at FROM maintenance_requests AS m2 WHERE m2.description = 'test'

SELECT a1.location_latitude, a1.installation_date, a1.department_id FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.location_latitude >= 101 UNION SELECT a2.location_latitude, a2.installation_date, a2.department_id FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.location_latitude <= 487
SELECT d1.is_active, d1.name FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.name = 'activity' UNION SELECT d2.is_active, d2.name FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.id > 77 ORDER BY is_active

SELECT a1.installation_date, a1.location_longitude, a1.location_latitude, a1.id FROM assets AS a1 WHERE a1.installation_date <= DATETIME('now', '-14 days') UNION ALL SELECT a2.installation_date, a2.location_longitude, a2.location_latitude, a2.id FROM assets AS a2 WHERE a2.installation_date > DATETIME('now', '-4 days')

SELECT s1.sensor_id, s1.id FROM sensor_readings AS s1 WHERE s1.recorded_at > DATETIME('now', '-24 days') UNION SELECT s2.sensor_id, s2.id FROM sensor_readings AS s2 WHERE s2.id <> 983 ORDER BY sensor_id LIMIT 27
SELECT t1.is_available, t1.first_name FROM technicians AS t1 WHERE t1.last_name = 'activity' UNION ALL SELECT t2.is_available, t2.first_name FROM technicians AS t2 WHERE t2.last_name = 'activity'

SELECT i1.detected_at, i1.incident_type, i1.id FROM incidents AS i1 WHERE i1.detected_at <= DATETIME('now', '-5 days') UNION ALL SELECT i2.detected_at, i2.incident_type, i2.id FROM incidents AS i2 WHERE i2.is_resolved = 1
